reference: BY ALLAH O MY LORD ANSWERED I THOU HAST INDEED OVERWHELMED ME WITH THY FAVOURS AND WELL DOINGS BUT I WEARY FOR A SIGHT OF MY FRIENDS AND FAMILY AND NATIVE COUNTRY
text: By Allah, are my lord answered I, thou hast indeed overwhelmed me with thy favors and welldoings, but I weary for a sight of my friends and family and native country.
